_comment: Allowlist for the GitHub<->HF-Space module-drift guard (hatun-mcp). ignore_paths/ignore_extensions are excluded entirely (binary/vendored assets). accepted_divergences are KNOWN, pre-existing GitHub<->HF divergences recorded so the guard lands green; each is still printed as a warning every run. Every entry below is ahead=github (the live Space is simply STALE: hf-sync was workflow_dispatch-only with no HF_TOKEN, so it never ran). Remove each entry once the first hf-deploy.yml run reconciles GitHub->HF and the OIDs match.

accepted_divergences.README.md: ahead=github by date, but CONTENT-DIVERGENT: the repo README has NO YAML front-matter (badges only) while the live Space card carries `sdk: docker` front-matter. Founder must reconcile (add front-matter to the repo README mirroring the curated card) BEFORE enabling a push-triggered deploy, else the COPY'd README clobbers the Space card. Remove this entry once reconciled.
accepted_divergences.requirements.txt: ahead=github. Pre-existing staleness (Space never redeployed). Remove once the first hf-deploy.yml run reconciles GitHub->HF.
